message:
Command `# SRAM PASS. Now run the full verification suite
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
python3 mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --rv-prefix riscv32-unknown-elf \
  --jobs 0 \
  2>&1 | tee /tmp/verify_run2.log
echo "EXIT: $?"` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# SRAM PASS. Now run the full verification suite
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
python3 mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --rv-prefix riscv32-unknown-elf \
  --jobs 0 \
  2>&1 | tee /tmp/verify_run2.log
echo "EXIT: $?"" timed out
